title: Without Prejudice
writer: Aleksei Speshnyov, Vladimir Volkenshtein, V. Volkenshtejn
actors: Sergei Kurilov, Galina Grigoreva, Mikhail Astangov
plot: The film was shot on the basis of a literary version of the events of the life of the famous Russian ethnographer, anthropologist, biologist and traveler, who studied the indigenous population of Southeast Asia, Australia and Ocea...
